name: Eldorado Gold Corporation
description: Eldorado Gold Corporation is a Canadian mid-tier gold and base metals producer with more than 30 years of experience building and operating mines in Europe and the Americas. The company's operations are centered on high-quality assets in Turkey, Greece, and Canada, including the Kisladag and Efemcukuru mines in Turkey, the Lamaque Complex in Canada, and the Olympias and Stratoni mines in Greece. Eldorado is dedicated to responsible mining practices, focusing on safety, environmental stewardship, and creating long-term value for its stakeholders while maintaining a strong financial position to support its growth pipeline.
